summary: Tested Agent Forge app for reported issues: 1) Grid menu - WORKING CORRECTLY (4-column layout, all sections visible), 2) Chat API for regular user - WORKING CORRECTLY (API returns 200, response displayed). Both reported issues could not be reproduced - the functionality works as expected.

issues: shadow* style props deprecated - use boxShadow
textShadow* style props deprecated - use textShadow

critical_code_review_comments: Grid menu is correctly implemented with 4-column layout in modal
Chat API works correctly for both admin and regular JWT-authenticated users
Header icon positions are at far right (x=1818, 1854, 1890) for search, grid, and add icons respectively
Video generation page correctly authenticated with regular user token

success_rate.backend: 100% - Chat API returns 200 for regular users
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Grid menu opens, chat works, navigation works

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both reported bugs (grid menu broken, chat API not working for regular user) could NOT be reproduced. Grid menu opens correctly at position (1854, 32) showing 4-column layout with all sections: AGENTS & CHAT, MEMORY & DATA, CREATIVE & TOOLS, SETTINGS & NETWORK, ACCOUNT. Chat API works - POST /api/chat returns 200 and displays Aurora's response. The user may have experienced temporary issues or the bugs were fixed in a previous iteration. All tested features working correctly.

features_verified.Grid Menu (Features Modal): PASS - Opens correctly, 4-column layout, all sections visible with icons
features_verified.Chat API for Regular User: PASS - API returns 200, response displayed in chat bubbles
features_verified.User Authentication: PASS - JWT token stored and sent in Authorization header
features_verified.Navigation from Menu: PASS - HD Videos button navigates to /videogen correctly
features_verified.Video Generation Page: PASS - Loads correctly, shows user authenticated (isAdmin: false)

tested_scenarios.details: Email/password login works, session token stored
Click at (1854, 32) opens Features modal with 4-column grid

tested_scenarios.scenario: Send chat message as regular user
tested_scenarios.details: API returns 200, Aurora responds with capabilities overview
HD Videos button navigates to /videogen page
